examples: And tell them I work as a carny?
Was your mother an evil carny who raised you in a wicker birdcage under the streets of Paris?
I'm not really a collector, but I had some other sideshow memorabilia along with the carny games that had been busted and confiscated.
Does it stack up as the ultimate lowbrow carny-sideshow of a cultural exposition or is it perhaps a form of stealth edification and ennoblement?
I've tried spending more than I was going to earn (remember, I was carny trash, that's why I know how to eat fire), and it way didn't work.
